next_steps: Review and negotiate security incident notice clause
Ensure customer audit rights are included in final agreement
Review and negotiate data usage clause

top_blockers.title: Limited liability cap
top_blockers.recommendation: Review and negotiate data usage clause

business_impact.label: Impact 1
business_impact.detail: Customer's claims may be capped at a lower amount than expected, leading to potential financial loss.

business_impact.label: Impact 2
business_impact.detail: Delayed service due to provider's discretion in sharing audit rights could result in customer dissatisfaction and operational disruptions.

findings.title: Limited liability cap
findings.recommendation: Review and negotiate data usage clause
findings.snippet: Aggregate liability limited to fees paid in prior 12 months, including for confidentiality and data-security claims.

findings.title: Potential misuse of service data for product development and model improvement without customer consent
findings.description: Potential misuse of service data for product development and model improvement without customer consent
findings.snippet: Provider may use de-identified service data for product development and model improvement.

findings.title: Delayed service due to provider's discretion in sharing audit rights
findings.description: Delayed service due to provider's discretion in sharing audit rights
findings.recommendation: Review and negotiate security incident notice clause
findings.snippet: No customer audit right. Provider may instead share a summary letter or certification at its discretion.

evidence_trail.title: Potential misuse of service data for product development and model improvement without customer consent
evidence_trail.snippet: Provider may use de-identified service data for product development and model improvement.
